backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—PDF site photos column and point-of-contact/project-manager fields—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Minimal Tailwind base file defining light and dark OKLCH CSS variable tokens for the shadcn-ui color system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Google Fonts (Inter and Oswald) and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, then mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header, hero feature-icon banner, the main ReportForm, and a footer with dynamic copyright year and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Main daily field report form managing all input sections—including Point of Contact and Project Manager fields, site photo upload, and signature canvas—with localStorage persistence and PDF generation trigger.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook wrapping DFINITY AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark industrial OKLCH color system with safety yellow/orange accents, custom button component classes, and dark color-scheme for date inputs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Defines the ReportData interface and a generatePDF function that uses jsPDF to produce a styled A4 PDF report with sections for project info, personnel, work items, safety notes, site photos, and signature.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow shadows, and animations, plus typography, animate, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for a Field Report App, recording two existing features (site photos column and point-of-contact/project-manager fields in the PDF/form) and their corresponding pending action requests.
